meta.notes: TEMPLATE — configure before enabling. Bridges a hands-free dictated message (the Ray-Ban Meta glasses' 'Hey Meta, send a message to Prefrontal: …') into POST /observe, the LLM-as-sensor, which records *pending* candidate updates you review later at GET /proposals (nothing authoritative is written until you accept). Replace the 'Inbound message' webhook with your real messaging trigger (WhatsApp Business Cloud, Telegram, Messenger, email) and edit 'Extract dictated text' to match its payload; wire the 'Reply' output back to your channel so the confirmation is spoken in your ear. The server strips the leading 'Prefrontal,' address itself, so forward the dictated line verbatim. Use a per-user Prefrontal token so proposals land in that user's queue. See deploy/meta-glasses.md.
